reference: If you take my advice, I would recommend confirming the pregnancy with a urine pregnancy test one week after intercourse because white discharge does not indicate that she is pregnant. Additionally, a confirmatory test would be an ultrasound examination.
text: If you take my advice, I would recommend confirming the pregnancy with a urine pregnancy test one week after intercourse, because white discharge does not indicate that she is pregnant. Additionally, a confirmatory test would be an ultrasound examination.
